title: Hot´n Visible Ancient Debris
description: Makes Ancient Debris WAY easier to see while still fitting into the Vanilla style!
body:
### If you're looking for a way to make Ancient Debris more visible without it being a pack going "let's make it fully bright blue", your search ends here!


While the hot orange parts already make it visible enough, there's also emissive textures, making them _glow_ if you have either

- **OptiFine** or
- **Continuity**
  
installed.
If it's not available for your version, don't worry, it'll work fine, just without the glow


**Have fun farming netherite!**


[Note: your game might say the pack is outdated, but don't worry, it'll work!]

![Previews from the Nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4acf7a42407d7ac4387f81d91a0dedff2dca0e68.png)
